'''Halleb Harmion''' was an executive with [[Gastess' Finance, Inc.]] His specialty was taking over the operations of corporations which the ruthless financier [[Sarlim Gastess]] had acquired. Like his brothers [[K'yne Harmion|K'yne]] and [[Sarell Harmion|Sarell]], he enjoyed taking a successful company and running it into the ground for short-term [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. His wife and family took equal glee in his work.
